title: Welcoming & Intro: Alejandro Cacace | Regulation Day Devconnect Edition
description:
This opening session features welcoming remarks by Alejandro Cacace, Deregulation Secretary of the National Government, moderated by Teófilo Beato from Crecimiento. The conversation sets the tone for Regulation Day, highlighting the importance of open dialogue between the public sector and the crypto ecosystem, and outlining the broader context in which regulatory discussions around emerging technologies are taking place.

This panel was part of Regulation Day – Devconnect Edition, held during Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires. Regulation Day brought together regulators, policymakers, founders, builders, and industry leaders to engage in constructive conversations about regulation, innovation, and the future of decentralized technologies.

Crecimiento is a global movement working to position Argentina as a leading hub for crypto and emerging technologies. Through community-driven programs, education, and dialogue between the public and private sectors, Crecimiento supports builders, founders, and institutions shaping the future of the ecosystem.
